name: Editorial
title: Editorial by HTML5 UP
description: Sidebar-layout blog/magazine template with a persistent left sidebar and scrollable main content area. Sidebar contains: search input field, hierarchical collapsible menu with expandable sub-sections, mini-post thumbnails with excerpts, and contact info (email, phone, address with icons). Main area: top header bar with logo and social icons row, hero banner with left text + right image layout, icon-based feature grid (gem, paper-plane, rocket, signal — 2x2), and 6 article post cards with images, titles, excerpts, and 'More' buttons. Coral-red accent color used for links, borders, and interactive elements. Serif+sans-serif font pairing (Roboto Slab + Open Sans).

typography.style: Dual font pairing — serif headings (Roboto Slab) with sans-serif body (Open Sans). Professional editorial feel. Uppercase labels with letter-spacing for hierarchy.

layoutDetails: Two-column layout: fixed/sticky left sidebar + scrollable main content. Sidebar width is fixed, main content fills remaining space. Sidebar has collapsible menu sections with CSS transitions. Main content uses flexbox grid for feature icons (2x2) and post cards (3x2). Hero banner uses side-by-side text+image layout. Responsive: sidebar collapses to hamburger on mobile.
visualStyle: Editorial, magazine-like, content-focused. Clean white main area with light gray sidebar. Coral-red accent for links and borders — warm but professional. Serif+sans-serif font pairing adds editorial sophistication. Icon-driven feature grid. Card-based article layout. Collapsible sidebar menu.

name: Future Imperfect
title: Future Imperfect by HTML5 UP
description: Magazine/blog layout with a main content area and right sidebar. Top header bar has the site title on the left, horizontal navigation links (Lorem, Ipsum, Feugiat, Tempus, Adipiscing), and right-side icons for search (expandable search input) and hamburger menu. Main content area shows 3 blog post cards — each with a title link, subtitle, meta info (date + author avatar), a large featured image, excerpt text, 'Continue Reading' button, and stats row (category tag, heart count, comment count). Pagination buttons at bottom ('Previous Page' disabled, 'Next Page' active). Right sidebar contains: site logo image + title + subtitle, 4 mini-post cards (title, date, author avatar, thumbnail image), 5 text-only post links with dates and thumbnails, an 'About' blurb section with 'Learn More' button, and footer with social icons (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, RSS, Email) and copyright. Light gray background.

typography.style: Dual-font system: Raleway for headings (extra-bold, uppercase, wide-spaced), Source Sans Pro for body (light weight). Strong editorial contrast.

layoutDetails: Two-column layout: main content area (~65%) + right sidebar (~35%). Blog posts stack vertically in main area. Sidebar has fixed-width with multiple widget sections. Responsive: sidebar moves below content on mobile. Container max-width with centered alignment.
visualStyle: Clean editorial/magazine aesthetic. Light gray background with white content cards. Strong typographic hierarchy with bold uppercase headings. Author avatars and meta information create a professional blog feel. Minimal color — mostly grayscale with teal accent.

name: Massively
title: Massively by HTML5 UP
description: Bold editorial blog template with a dramatic fullscreen intro. Opens with a large hero section featuring the site name in massive serif typography over a background image, with a down-arrow scroll button. Sticky navigation bar with page links and social icons (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, GitHub). Featured post section with date stamp, large headline, excerpt, full-width image, and 'Full Story' button. Below: a 2-column grid of 6 blog post cards, each with date, title, thumbnail, excerpt, and button. Pagination bar (1-10 pages). Footer split into two columns: left has a contact form (Name, Email, Message), right has address, phone, email, and social icons. Dark navy background (#1e252d) with white content area.

typography.style: Dramatic serif body with heavy sans-serif headings, editorial magazine feel

layoutDetails: Max-width content container centered on page. Dark background visible as page frame. 2-column post grid below featured post. Sticky navigation bar. Footer splits into form + contact info columns.
visualStyle: Bold, editorial, magazine-inspired. Dramatic contrast between dark page background and white content cards. Heavy serif typography with massive headings. Cyan accent for links and interactive elements.

name: Striped
title: Striped by HTML5 UP
description: Classic blog template with a right-side sidebar layout. Main content area shows blog posts in a vertical feed: each post has a linked title heading, subtitle, metadata bar (date with month/day/year and stats showing comment count, heart count, Twitter shares, Facebook shares), a featured image, and body text. Two sample posts are shown. Below posts is a pagination bar with numbered page links (1-4, ellipsis, 20) and a 'Next Page' button. Right sidebar contains: site logo 'STRIPED' in bold caps, vertical navigation (Latest Post, Archives, About Me, Contact Me), a search input field, a text description box, 'Recent Posts' list with 5 linked titles, 'Recent Comments' list with 3 entries, and a calendar widget showing a monthly grid with clickable date links. Light theme with pink/rose accent color on buttons.

typography.style: Condensed sans-serif for a compact, editorial feel. Bold headings with normal body weight. Clean and readable for long-form content.

layoutDetails: Two-column layout: main content (left, wider) and sidebar (right, narrower). Sidebar is repositionable. Posts stack vertically. Pagination uses inline page numbers. Calendar uses HTML table. Responsive with sidebar stacking below content on mobile.
visualStyle: Clean, classic blog aesthetic. White background with light gray sidebar. Rose pink accent on buttons and interactive elements. Calendar widget and metadata stats add editorial detail. Traditional blog feel.

name: Strongly Typed
title: Strongly Typed by HTML5 UP
description: Blog/magazine template with top navigation and sidebar. Header section with site name 'Strongly Typed', subtitle, and horizontal icon navigation bar (Home, Dropdown with nested submenus, Left Sidebar, Right Sidebar, No Sidebar). Features section: 3-column grid of image cards, each with a featured image, heading, and description paragraph, plus a 'Tell Me More' button. Banner section: full-width dark bar with a bold statement. Main content area in 8/4 column split: left content has 2 full blog posts with linked headings, featured images, subheadings, body text, and 'Continue Reading' buttons. Right sidebar has 3 dated post excerpts and 2 highlight articles with left-aligned thumbnail images. Footer with contact form (Name, Email, Message, Send button), address/phone/email info, and social icon links (Twitter, Instagram, Dribbble, Facebook). Light gray textured background with coral/salmon accent.

typography.style: Uppercase headings with wide letter-spacing create a structured, typed feel. Light body weight (300) contrasts with semi-bold headings (600). Monospace-inspired aesthetic.

layoutDetails: Full-width header with centered container. Features use 3-column grid. Main content is 8/4 column split (content/sidebar). Footer is 2-column. Dropdown navigation with nested submenus. Responsive with stacking on mobile.
visualStyle: Light gray textured background with white content cards. Coral/salmon accent adds warmth. Uppercase headings with wide tracking create a 'strongly typed' mechanical feel. Professional blog/magazine aesthetic.

name: Clean Blog
title: Clean Blog - Start Bootstrap Theme
description: Classic blog theme with a clean editorial aesthetic. Top navigation bar with brand name and links (Home, About, Sample Post, Contact). Full-width masthead header with background image, dark overlay, centered blog title and subtitle in white. Main content area is a narrow centered column (col-xl-7) listing 4 blog post previews, each with a linked post title (h2), optional subtitle (h3), and italic meta line showing author and date. Posts are separated by horizontal rules. A right-aligned Older Posts pagination button at the bottom. Footer has centered social icon links (Twitter, Facebook, GitHub) using Font Awesome stacked circle icons, plus copyright text. Multi-page structure with separate about, post, and contact pages. Navbar becomes transparent over the masthead on desktop and transitions to white on scroll.

colorPalette.masthead: #6c757d (gray fallback) with background-image and #212529 overlay at 50% opacity
colorPalette.heading: #212529 (near-black, Open Sans 800)

typography.style: Serif body with extra-bold sans-serif headings, classic editorial contrast

layoutDetails: Container-based centered layout, max col-xl-7 for content. Masthead uses full-width background image with dark overlay. Responsive grid with Bootstrap 5 gx-4/gx-lg-5 gutters. Navbar collapses at 992px breakpoint.
visualStyle: Clean editorial blog with serif body text, bold sans-serif headings, full-width header images with dark overlays, and generous whitespace between posts.

name: Calvin
title: Calvin
description: Multi-page blog template with a fixed header containing logo, dropdown navigation (Home, Categories with 8 sub-items, Blog with 3 post types, Styles, About, Contact), hamburger menu, and fullscreen search overlay. Hero section with fullscreen image slider (3 slides with background images, category tags, author byline, and large title text). Vertical social links sidebar on left with 'Follow' label. Prev/next arrow navigation for slider. Below hero, masonry blog grid with decorative vertical lines. 8 blog post cards with thumbnails (retina srcset), titles, author byline, category tags, excerpts, and 'Read More' links. Cards animate on scroll (data-aos fade-up). Pagination with numbered pages. Footer with 4 columns: About text, Site Links, Social links, and Subscribe form. Back-to-top button. Preloader.

typography.fontFamily: Inter (body), DM Serif Text / DM Serif Display (headings)
typography.style: Elegant serif/sans-serif pairing. DM Serif Display for large hero titles, DM Serif Text for smaller headings, Inter for body. Sophisticated editorial feel.

layoutDetails: Masonry grid for blog posts with CSS columns. Fullscreen hero slider with background images. Footer uses 4-column grid. Decorative vertical lines in masonry section. Responsive breakpoints at 400-1200px.
visualStyle: Sophisticated editorial blog with deep blue and crimson accents. Fullscreen hero slider creates dramatic entry. Masonry layout with decorative vertical lines adds visual rhythm. Serif headings give editorial authority.

name: Keep It Simple
title: Keep It Simple
description: Clean minimalist blog template with a two-column layout: main content area (8 columns) on the left and a sidebar (4 columns) on the right. The header features a site logo/title with tagline and a horizontal navigation bar with dropdown menus. The main content displays 4 blog post entries, each with a large linked heading, metadata row (date, category tags, author), and a text excerpt paragraph. The sidebar contains 5 widgets stacked vertically: search box, categories list with post counts, text widget, tag cloud with inline tag links, and popular posts list. The footer has three columns: social media icon row (7 icons: Facebook, Twitter, YouTube, Vimeo, Instagram, LinkedIn, Skype), an about section with description text, a photostream grid of 8 thumbnail images, and a navigation links list. Back-to-top button with SVG arrow icon. Preloader with dots-fade animation on page load.

typography.style: Classic serif body with clean sans-serif headings, high readability blog typography with generous line-height of 2

layoutDetails: Two-column layout using flexbox grid: 8-column main content + 4-column sidebar. Max-width container with centered alignment. Sidebar stacks below content on mobile. Block grid breakpoints at 900px and 1000px.
visualStyle: Clean, minimal, content-first blog design with generous whitespace, serif body text for readability, and subtle green accent color. No hero images or flashy elements — pure editorial focus.

name: Spurgeon
title: Spurgeon
description: Modern blog template with a full-width hero slider using Swiper.js showing 3 featured articles with large background images, category tags, titles, excerpts, and Read More links. Below the hero is a masonry grid of blog posts with thumbnail images, category labels, author bylines, titles, and excerpts. Header features site title branding, horizontal navigation with dropdown submenus for Categories and Blog post types, a search trigger icon, and a mobile menu toggle. Search opens a full-width overlay with input field. Posts support standard, video, and audio formats. Pagination at bottom. Footer includes email subscription form, social media links (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, Dribbble), and copyright. Clean white background with black text and teal/coral accent colors.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif body with serif accent font, modern editorial blog feel

layoutDetails: Custom CSS grid system with responsive columns. Hero slider is full-width. Masonry layout for blog posts using CSS columns. Max container width with centered content. Responsive breakpoints from 400px to 1400px.
visualStyle: Clean white editorial blog with bold black typography, teal and coral accent colors, large featured images, masonry card layout

name: Typerite
title: Typerite
description: Clean light-themed blog template with a left-aligned header containing logo, horizontal navigation with dropdown submenus (Categories, Blog Posts), and social media icons. Search functionality via a slide-down search bar with magnifying glass trigger. Main content area displays blog posts in a masonry grid layout with multiple post formats: standard posts with featured images, quote posts with styled blockquotes, and more. Each post card shows a thumbnail image, title, category tags, date, and excerpt with Read More link. Posts use retina-ready srcset images. Sidebar-free design focuses entirely on content. Footer has about text, contact info, and social links. Pagination at bottom. Light gray background (#f6f7f8) with black text and teal/rose accent colors.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif pairing with medium-weight headings, generous body size for readability

layoutDetails: Full-width masonry layout using CSS columns. No sidebar — content-focused single column. Posts arranged in Pinterest-style masonry grid. Responsive with breakpoints from 400px to 1200px.
visualStyle: Clean minimal blog with light gray background, black typography, teal links, masonry card grid, generous whitespace

name: Magazee
title: Magazee HTML5 Template Mo
description: Modern magazine/blog-style single-page template with page loader animation. First section has split layout: left half with maroon background and large 'Magazee' site name, right half with centered italic quote. Second section (reversed on mobile) has left half with heading, description, and Read More button, right half with maroon background containing circular image and white description text. Third section has left half with full-width image and right half with heading, description, and Read More button. Fourth section has 8-column text area with maroon heading, two description paragraphs, and Read More button, plus 4-column side image. Fifth section features pricing: left image, center Standard Plan card ($25/month with 6 features and Buy Now button), right Advanced Plan card ($40/month with 6 features). Sixth section has application form with 2-column layout (name, email, position select, salary select, gender radio, message textarea) and Submit button. Gray footer with 2-column address and info layout. Bottom copyright bar.

typography.style: Light-weight Open Sans with generous 18px body size and 1.8 line-height for editorial readability

layoutDetails: Container-based layout with 30px top margin. Sections use alternating 50/50 split layouts with flexbox centering. Min-height 400px per section. Pricing tables with bordered cards. Application form with 2-column layout. Max-width 880px inner container. Responsive at 1200px, 992px, 600px.
visualStyle: Clean editorial/magazine aesthetic with maroon and teal accent colors on light gray background. Alternating split-section layouts create visual rhythm. Pricing cards and application form add functional depth. Light typography for comfortable reading.

name: Purple Buzz
title: Purple Buzz HTML Template with Bootstrap 5 Beta 1
description: Corporate blog template with a clean light design and purple accent color. Features a white navbar with rounded pill-style navigation links and utility icons (bell, settings, user). Hero section uses a Bootstrap carousel slider with large display headings and Get Started CTA buttons. Services section displays a filterable portfolio grid with category tabs (Graphics, UI/UX, Branding) and image cards with overlay labels. Team section shows member cards with photos, names, roles, and social links. Blog section presents article cards in a 4-column grid with images, dates, categories, and excerpts. Testimonials section with client quotes. Contact form at bottom. Multi-page with about, work, pricing, and contact pages. Uses Open Sans with Boxicons icon set.

typography.style: Light body weight with semi-bold headings, modern corporate readability

layoutDetails: Multi-page layout (6 HTML pages). Bootstrap 5 carousel hero. Filterable portfolio grid with Isotope. 4-column blog card grid. Team member cards. Responsive with pill-shaped nav links.
visualStyle: Clean corporate blog with purple accent. Pill-shaped navigation buttons. Card-based content throughout. Filterable portfolio with overlay labels. Modern minimal with generous whitespace. Boxicons for UI elements.

name: Stand Blog
title: Stand CSS Blog by TemplateMo
description: Multi-page blog template with a large Owl Carousel banner slider showing featured posts with category badges (Fashion, Nature, Lifestyle), titles, author info, dates, and comment counts overlaid on full-width images. Below the banner, a call-to-action bar. Main content area displays blog posts in a two-column card grid with large thumbnails, category tags, titles, excerpts, and Read More links. Right sidebar contains search box, recent posts with thumbnails, and category listing. Preloader with animated dots. Separate About, Blog Entries, Post Details, and Contact pages.

typography.style: Clean Roboto with heavy headings and light body text

layoutDetails: Multi-page blog layout. Full-width carousel banner at top. Main content uses 2-column grid for posts with a right sidebar. Bootstrap 4 grid system.
visualStyle: Clean, modern blog aesthetic. Orange accent color for buttons and highlights. White background with gray text. Large featured images. Professional editorial feel.

name: Xtra Blog
title: Xtra Blog
description: Blog template with a fixed left sidebar featuring a teal (#0CC) background, site logo (X icon), brand name, icon-based navigation (Blog Home, Single Post, About, Contact), social media links, and descriptive text. The sidebar scrolls independently with hidden scrollbar. Main content area displays blog post cards in a responsive grid (3 columns on desktop) with large featured images, category tags, post titles, dates, and excerpts. Search form at the top of content area. Pagination at the bottom. Multi-page with single post, about, and contact pages. Source Sans Pro font with generous 19px body size and 2em line-height.

typography.style: Large body text with generous line-height (2em) for blog readability. Clean sans-serif.

layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar (400px) with teal background. Scrollable main content area. Blog post grid (3 columns). Pagination. Multi-page structure. Bootstrap 4 grid.
visualStyle: Bold teal sidebar contrasting with clean white content area. Large blog post cards with featured images. Modern blog aesthetic with generous whitespace and readable typography.

name: Galaxy
title: Galaxy - Personal Blog Template
description: Personal blog template with dark theme and red accent. Sidebar layout with fixed left panel showing blog title/logo, navigation links (Home, About, Contact, Pages), and social media icons. Main content area with featured posts section showing large blog post cards with images, titles, dates, and excerpts. About Me section with author bio. Subscribe section with email input for blog updates. Individual post cards with hover effects. Dark charcoal/near-black background with red accent color for links and interactive elements. Condensed sans-serif typography with Barlow Condensed for headings.

typography.style: Condensed sans-serif headings with modern body font, editorial dark feel

layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar with navigation, scrollable main content area, blog card grid, responsive sidebar collapse at 991px
visualStyle: Dark editorial blog with red accents, sidebar navigation, featured post cards, and condensed typography

name: Newsbit
title: NewsBit - News Magazine Newspaper HTML Template
description: News magazine and newspaper template with a dark trending news ticker bar at the top featuring a Slick carousel of headlines and social media icon links. Below sits a header with logo and ad banner, followed by a dark full-width navigation bar with dropdown menus for Home, Post, Account, About, Pages, and Contact. The main content area opens with two side-by-side featured post sliders showing large image cards with category badges, titles, and dates. Below, the layout splits into a main column with categorized post blocks (each with a bold category heading, a large featured image post, and smaller thumbnail list posts) and a right sidebar with popular/recent post widgets. A full-width four-column news grid on a light gray background follows. The footer is dark with multi-column widgets, social links, and copyright.
layoutDetails: Classic newspaper grid layout with main content column and right sidebar. Featured slider area spans full width. Post blocks use mixed large-image plus thumbnail-list patterns. Dark top bar and navigation, light content area, dark footer.
visualStyle: Traditional news magazine with bold red category badges, dark navigation bars, white content areas, and structured post grid blocks. Clean typography with clear hierarchy between headlines and body text.

typography.style: News editorial with tight letter-spacing on headlines, uppercase category labels, and clean sans-serif body text

name: Parsa
title: Parsa | Portfolio Template
description: Personal blog and portfolio template with a minimal sticky header featuring a centered logo and navigation links for Home, About, Categories, and Contact. A full-width featured post slider spans the viewport with large background images, overlay gradients, and post titles. Below, a masonry grid layout displays blog post cards with featured images, category tags, titles, dates, and excerpt text. Each card has rounded corners and subtle shadows. An Instagram feed slider runs full-width at the bottom. The footer is minimal with social links and copyright. Warm orange accent against clean white backgrounds with generous whitespace.
layoutDetails: Full-width featured slider at top, followed by masonry grid of post cards. Instagram slider spans full width. Minimal header and footer. Content-focused layout with generous spacing.
visualStyle: Clean editorial blog with warm orange accent, masonry card grid, large featured images, and minimal chrome. Light and airy with focus on content.

typography.style: Custom serif-like heading font with clean sans-serif body. Large display sizes up to 80px.

name: Reader
title: Reader | Hugo Personal Blog Template
description: Personal blog template with a playful, colorful design. The header features a centered navigation with decorative geometric shapes (circles, triangles) as background accents. A large banner area with the blog title and decorative border elements sits above the content. Post sliders display blog cards with featured images, category labels, titles, dates, and author info. The main content area shows a grid of post cards with hover effects. A sidebar includes an about widget, category list, and tags. An Instagram feed slider runs at the bottom. The footer has social links and a clean copyright bar. Green accent gives a fresh, lively feel.
layoutDetails: Centered content layout with post card grids. Banner with decorative shapes. Post sliders for featured content. Sidebar widgets. Instagram slider at bottom.
visualStyle: Fresh and playful blog with vibrant green accent, decorative geometric shapes, clean white backgrounds, and card-based post layouts. Rounded elements and subtle shadows.

typography.textTransform: uppercase for labels, capitalize for titles
typography.style: Rounded sans-serif with extra-bold headings for strong visual hierarchy.

name: Reporter
title: Reporter - HTML Blog Template
description: Minimal personal blog template with a clean, text-focused design. Features a simple top navigation with the blog name and links to About Me, Articles, Contact, and dropdown pages. The main content area displays blog posts in a clean list/card format with large featured images, titles, dates, and excerpt text. A sidebar shows widget blocks including author bio with photo, recent posts, and category lists. Section titles use a distinctive underline accent in green. The footer is minimal with a dark background and simple navigation links. Emphasizes readability with Work Sans and Neuton font pairing.
layoutDetails: Two-column layout with main content area and sidebar. Blog posts in vertical list with large images. Sidebar with author bio and widget blocks. Simple header and minimal footer.
visualStyle: Minimal text-focused blog with green accent underlines, clean white backgrounds, and generous whitespace. Content-first design with elegant font pairing.

typography.textTransform: capitalize for titles, uppercase for labels
typography.style: Modern sans-serif paired with classic serif for an editorial feel.

name: Revolve
title: Revolve - Personal Magazine blog Template
description: Personal magazine blog template with an elegant, editorial design. The header features a centered logo with a top bar in gray, social media links, and a horizontal navigation menu. A large full-width post slider showcases featured articles with overlay text on background images. Below, the main content area displays blog posts in a clean grid with large thumbnail images, category labels, post titles, dates, and author info. A subscription/newsletter section encourages email signups. The footer has a gray background with social links and copyright. Warm terracotta/copper accent gives a sophisticated, fashion-magazine aesthetic with serif typography for headings.
layoutDetails: Full-width featured slider at top. Blog posts in mixed grid layouts below. Centered header with horizontal navigation. Newsletter subscription section. Gray footer.
visualStyle: Elegant editorial magazine with warm terracotta accent, serif typography for headings, clean white content areas, and sophisticated image-heavy layouts. Fashion/lifestyle aesthetic.

typography.style: Elegant serif headings (Unna/Lora) with clean sans-serif body (Open Sans). Editorial magazine typography.
